subject: Public Health
title: The Ten Essential Services
description: Learn The Ten Essential Services in one minute.

hook.text: Every public health system in the world does ten core things—from monitoring to enforcing laws.

buildup.text: They include disease surveillance, health education, and policy development.

discovery.text: Workforce development is one of the ten—training enough nurses, inspectors, and epidemiologists.

twist.text: Research is also essential: without evidence, policies are just guesses.

climax.text: The framework was updated in 2020 to center equity in every service.

punchline.text: Ten services. One goal: keep everyone healthy.

quiz.question: What was added as a central focus in the 2020 update to the essential services?
